site_brief: Rural UK property. 100 A single-phase 230 V supply at the main service entrance head. Standalone outbuilding 100 m from the main dwelling requires its own 100 A sub-distribution board (SDB). The submain runs direct-buried (0.6 m depth, undisturbed soil, thermal resistivity 2.5 K·m/W per BS 7671 App 4 §2.4) from the main service to the outbuilding SDB. This study sizes the SWA submain per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Appendix 4 Table 4D5A.

circuits_declared.designation: 100 m direct-buried PVC SWA submain to outbuilding SDB

design_intent.calculation_method: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Appendix 4 Table 4D5A Method D (direct-buried, two-core PVC SWA, copper). Voltage drop per Appendix 12. Adiabatic CPC check per Reg 543.1.3 using the SWA armour as CPC per Reg 543.2.5.
